Appearances:
Plaintiff Gaucho Partners, LP is present. Represented by Gina Dawson.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Felecia Ann Hawkins is present.
Attorney Sarah Davis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweitzer, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per Judge Pro Tem Schweitzer.

The trial date of JAN-17-2012 is vacated.
